blind_check.method: all fail verdicts read in full against raw output; uncertains NOT adjudicated (await the judge layer, TASKS.md task 3); passes spot-checked only. Grader verdicts in `results` are untouched — disagreements recorded here.

judge_meta.note: judge verdicts adjudicate the uncertain bucket only; grader verdicts and human labels are untouched. Validate before trusting (see module docstring).
